title: Assist in the maintenance of reference materials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Assist in the maintenance of reference materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Acquire reference materials

pcs.text: Confirm that required transit conditions were maintained
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that required transit conditions were maintained?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that required transit conditions were maintained.

pcs.text: Apply quarantine or isolation arrangements as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply quarantine or isolation arrangements as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply quarantine or isolation arrangements as necessary.

pcs.text: Record data of accessioned reference material in the collection database
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record data of accessioned reference material in the collection database?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record data of accessioned reference material in the collection database.

pcs.text: Label material to ensure that its identity is maintained during storage and issue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label material to ensure that its identity is maintained during storage and issue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label material to ensure that its identity is maintained during storage and issue.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Acquire reference materials

elements.title: Maintain reference materials

pcs.text: Monitor storage conditions to ensure that they comply with suppliers' warranty specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor storage conditions to ensure that they comply with suppliers' warranty specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor storage conditions to ensure that they comply with suppliers' warranty specifications.

pcs.text: Monitor storage conditions to ensure materials remain true to specification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor storage conditions to ensure materials remain true to specification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor storage conditions to ensure materials remain true to specification.

pcs.text: Test material during storage and before release to report on reference characteristics and specificity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Test material during storage and before release to report on reference characteristics and specificity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Test material during storage and before release to report on reference characteristics and specificity.

pcs.text: Report findings that suggest reference specimens may be deteriorating
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report findings that suggest reference specimens may be deteriorating?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report findings that suggest reference specimens may be deteriorating.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Maintain reference materials

elements.title: Dispense reference materials to clients

pcs.text: Verify requests with supervisor before requests for reference materials are processed

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Verify requests with supervisor before requests for reference materials are processed.

pcs.text: Supply reference material without contamination of stock material

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supply reference material without contamination of stock material.

pcs.text: Keep records of materials issued in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Keep records of materials issued in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Keep records of materials issued in accordance with workplace procedures.
